label: Trust Guarantees
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a trust/guarantees block (a 'Varfor oss' icon bullet list), server-rendered with no client JS. Content is grounded in static project-input signals (trustSignals, uniqueSellingPoints, or confirmed businessFacts) - it never renders an invented certificate, review or guarantee. Reuses the existing render_section_trust_proof renderer; the section_builder follow-up role mounts it for a 'garantier/trust' section_add through the same apply chain component_add uses.
